'''bayada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoprotein|mycoprotein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoprotein|mycoprotein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bayada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæyædæth|bæyædæth]] || [[word:bæyædæj|bæyædæj]] || [[word:bæyædæsh|bæyædæsh]] || [[word:bæyædæ|bæyædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayayadath|bayayadath]] || [[word:bayayadaj|bayayadaj]] || [[word:bayayadash|bayayadash]] || [[word:bayayada|bayayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayadath|bayadath]] || [[word:bayadaj|bayadaj]] || [[word:bayadash|bayadash]] || [[word:bayada|bayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayafdafth|bayafdafth]] || [[word:bayafdafj|bayafdafj]] || [[word:bayafdafsh|bayafdafsh]] || [[word:bayafdaf|bayafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bayadatha|bayadatha]] || [[word:bayadaja|bayadaja]] || [[word:bayadasha|bayadasha]] || [[word:bayadaka|bayadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bayadath|bayadath]] || [[word:bayadaj|bayadaj]] || [[word:bayadash|bayadash]] || [[word:bayada|bayada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bayadathal|bayadathal]] || [[word:bayadajal|bayadajal]] || [[word:bayadashal|bayadashal]] || [[word:bayadakal|bayadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bayadaathatha|bayadaathatha]] || [[word:bayadaajaja|bayadaajaja]] || [[word:bayadaashasha|bayadaashasha]] || [[word:bayadaaka|bayadaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bayadathan|bayadathan]] || [[word:bayadajan|bayadajan]] || [[word:bayadashan|bayadashan]] || [[word:bayadakan|bayadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bayadathaoro|bayadathaoro]] || [[word:bayadajaoro|bayadajaoro]] || [[word:bayadashaoro|bayadashaoro]] || [[word:bayadakaoro|bayadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
